description: Sympathetic momentum peer-catchup scanner. 25 sub-industry peer groups, 90+ tickers. Within each group: leader 5d>80th pctile + laggard underperforms by >=1.5 group-std + 90d corr>0.55 + RSI<75. Scores composite setup, generates long-laggard trade tickets. Daily 23:30 UTC.

eventbridge_scheduler.description: Sympathetic momentum peer-catchup scanner daily 23:30 UTC
